description:
Overview:

【Precision Grinding Settings】Electric coffee grinder with a ceramic burr, the ceramic burr will not increase heat during grinding, more precision than a blade grinder, the strong and aroma of coffee can be maintained, and the taste of coffee is better. Burr coffee grinder can grind up to 25 grams (3-5 cups) of coffee beans at a time which is the best choice for coffee lovers.

【Portable and easy to charge】Built in 1200mAh Battery, charged through USB-type-c and provides up to a week running time after 3 hours fully charged.Electric conical burr grinder with durable DC motor and reducer. One button on/off, automatic stop without coffee beans. Put this cordless and USB rechargeable mini coffee grinder in your bag or suitcase, you can enjoy ground coffee anytime, anywhere, whether at home, work, travel, hiking or camping.

【Easy to Clean】The removable upper burr, hopper and chamber removes easily for effortless cleanup. Grounds bin with ceramic burr and be-an hopper can be washed with water and does not rust. Note: The grinding motor is not washable.

【Multi Grind Setting】 The portable conical burr coffee grinder boasts multi-grind settings to grind your coffee beans for any desired brewing method. With this electric coffee grinder, you will never have to worry about uneven coffee grounds, no matter which grind size you select.

【More Quiet Grinding】Our coffee grinder is quieter than other coffee grinders on the market. When you grind coffee in the morning, you don’t have to worry about making too much noise and disturbing your family.It is the perfect gift for coffee lovers and also an ideal great gift for parents and friends.


Product information:

Product category: Grinder
Function: Adjustable gear, portable charging, low bass noise reduction
Color: Frosted white coffee grinder, premium black coffee grinder
Rated voltage: ≤ 36V (V)
Product size: 8 * 20cm
Cup material: plastic


Packing list:

Grinder * 1 charging line * 1 manual * 1
